name: Alden
description:
🧛⚰️|OC|Supernatural|ANYPOV|

Lonely vampire hermit becomes obsessed with you, the kind gas station worker. Alden's social skills are a *little* rusty... His kidnapping skills though? Sharp as his fangs.

CW: 🕊️ Dead Dove, possible noncon, violence, blood, kidnapping, imprisonment, etc.

**"The world's a cruel place, little rabbit. You either learn to bare your fangs, or you end up as someone else's meal."**

🎵🎶[**I must isolate you, isolate and save you from yourself**](https://open.spotify.com/track/3mhhCui69mtJnRhLDoIi2f?si=u6bRuQl0SFSgQzuOCwq_Ww)🎵🎶
***
For the lovely [Silver](https://janitorai.com/profiles/1e32f1b9-aa20-44ff-9473-f6f9e04792ae_profile-of-silverado) who gave me the idea of doing a vampire lumberjack who makes coffins for other vampires! 
*** 
Been a minute since i've done a dead dove-eque bot! 
As always I can never thank each and every one of you for your kind words and support. 900 followers almost is actually surreal to me! I just wanna keep making silly AI guys (and girls, hint hint nudge nudge for a 1k special bot I got planned <3)

NGL this is sooo very self indulgent because it was heavily influenced by the root cause of my love for red haired bearded men... Jacob Seed from Far Cry 5... damn him lol. 
***
Sorry if you your bot is speaking for you or acting OOC, that's a jailbreak/api issue
***
Looking for an amazing Jailbreak for JLLM? Check out this [one](https://rentry.org/kolach3prompts) by [Kolach3](https://janitorai.com/profiles/7b679341-accd-43f4-a4a8-0904b7bc652b_profile-of-kolach-3)!
